payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory_cards. No memories were created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No existing memory was deleted or modified.

repair_options: If you intended to delete your own saved memories, use an authorized user-facing memory deletion command.
If you are an administrator, authenticate through the proper admin channel before issuing administrative operations.
